titleStmt.title: SII 27.96: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 96. (A.R. No. 266 of 1931-32.) HOSĀḶA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab lying in the backyard of the house of sthānika Nārāyaṇayya at Chauḷikēri.
This Kannaḍa record, in Nāgarī characters, is dated Śaka 1345, Kali 4524, (Śōbha)kṛit, Bhādrapada ba. 8, Saturday corresponding to 1423 A.D., August 28, Saturday, f.d.t. ·16.
It registers several gifts of land and money to the temple of Narasiṅghadēva, at Kellaṁgere, while Virupaṇṇa-oḍeya was governing at Bārakūra-rājya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipataye namaḥ . śrī nṛsiṁhyāya namaḥ . śrīmatsurāsurādhīśa maulimālopalālitam
śrī nṛsiṁhasya śāsanaṁ graṇiyaṁ kāruṇya kṛpāsāgara vatsala
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya kaliyugada prathamapāda dalli saṁda kali varṣa 4524 śālivā
hana śakavarṣa 1345 saṁdu vartamāna sobhakṛtsaṁvatsarada bhādrapada bahula 8 śanivāradalu svasti śrīmanma
hārājādhirāja rājaparameśvara Arirāyavibhāḍa bhāṣegetappuvarāyaragaṁḍa śrī vīra pratāpa vijayabukarāyaru niru
padiṁda virupaṇṇa voḍeyaru bārakūra rājyavanu pratipālisuva kāladalu kelluṁgeriya nārasiṁhyadevarige barasikoṭṭa śi
lāśāsanada kramavetedare bārakūra parivāra samucayavāgi Ā nṛsiṁhya devara vasaṁtotsavake pūrvamariyādeyalu naḍa
si baha bārakūra kāṭi ga 51 Akṣaradalu Aivattu hoṁnu yī hoṁnina volage narasiṁhyadevara devasvada
da bālina vivara . kuṁdāpurada purohitādhivāsadali narasiṁhya devara devasvada bāla catuḥsīmeya viva
ra mūḍalu vā hiriya gaḍiyiṁda paḍuvalu teṁkalu śrī dhanara gaḍiyiṁda baḍagalu paḍuvalu holeyiṁda mūḍalu baḍagalu
viyāṇiyakalu gaḍiyiṁda teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīmeya volage nāgaṁḍu gadalu mūḍe 20 yī bālige
di kāra modalu kulāgra mūḍe 6 Āru mūḍe kulāgrakkaṁ prati mūḍe voṁdake ga 3 haṇa 50 devasvada
ga 22 ha 1 na mariyāde kālavrayake kaṭṭi kodaṁḍa ga 7 ha 7 Ubhaya ga 30 Akṣaradalu mūvattu hoṁna
Ā narasiṁhya devarige Ā purohitada Ūru jagattu hedāriyiṁda mūḍalu māravina bayalolage bittuva ga
volage bittuva ga Aravattu hāne Ā bālige ba ba sahitavoṁdu mūḍe te ri
vāgi koṭṭaru Ā voṁdu mūḍe teriṁge ga 5 Akṣaradalu Aidu hoṁnu . Aṁtu Ubhayaṁ mū 3 kaṁ ga 35
saṁnidhānadalu mūvattaidu hoṁnu nu hi koṁḍu melāda bādheyanu Ūru jagattu pariharisi
baharu bālina terū nimittavāgi Arasu bādheya māḍidare A Aiyanavaru Ūru jagattu kūḍiye kuḍuvaru
Arasū Ūru samuhayadalu na nārasiṁhya devara saṁnidhiyalu virupaṇṇa voḍoyara kāladalu bara
si silāśāsana . śrīmatu nārasiṁhya devara Amṛta paḍige malālanātha Ayyanavarige dhārā
pūrvakaṁvāgi goraṭava koṭiyaṇṇa vemaṇṇa Aliya nāgaṁṇṇa seṭi balagāḍinavolage koṭa haneraḍu mūḍe Akiya bā
lina catu sīmeya vivara mūḍalu caṁḍa koṭhāriya gaḍiyiṁda paḍuvalu teṁkalu geluva koḍalu kāṭiṁda baḍagalu paḍuvalu
maṇṇa ya bāliṁda mūḍalu baḍagalu Acuta ḍahana gāḍiyiṁda teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīmeya volage bayalu bittuva badega
ṇa gilu nāgaṁḍugadalu Āru mūḍe . nimakayalu nama diru koṁḍa kāṭi ga ye pattaudu to gaterū deva kalkuḍa
Aidu mūḍe Ākiya bāha dhārāpūrvakavāgi koṭṭa yeḍese baligeya bāla catusīme mūḍalu goviṁda keku
ḍeya bāla gaḍiIṁda paḍuvalu teṁkalu Uddāḍiya nāraṇa nagulana bāla gāḍiIṁda baḍagalu paḍuvalu cauṁḍa ko
ṭhāriya bāla dāḍiIṁda mūḍalu baḍagalu nāraṇa kekuḍeya bāla gaḍiIṁda teṁkalu Iṁtī catusīmeIṁdolage bi
ttuva bayalu nāgaṁḍugadalu nūrū mūḍe Ubhayaṁ 100 mūḍe bayalanu dāna dhārāpūrvakavāgi
koṭa yī bālige teru voṁbhattu mūḍe śrī mahā
Digital edition of SII 27.96 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
